data.name: UiScalingTooltip
data.value: Scales the entire interface (text, controls, and spacing). Choose from 75% to 100% in 5% steps; 100% is default.

data.name: AppSubtitle
data.value: Convert a Minecraft resource pack to a PBR-friendly pack (specular + normal + height).

data.name: BatchConversionDescription
data.value: Choose a folder of .zip / .jar resource packs. Scan builds one explorer tree with each pack as a top-level folder. Batch convert runs conversion on every pack into your output folder (each pack becomes …_PBR.zip). Use Explore to browse; Convert (single pack) is disabled while a batch scan is active.

data.name: ExploreEmptyMessage
data.value: Scan a pack or valid folder to explore contents.

data.name: ClearTagOverridesTooltip
data.value: Reset all manual tag add/remove for this pack.

data.name: TagRulesCustomDescription
data.value: Edit your own rulesets to guide heuristic and/or AI processing

data.name: RulesetsSystemRulesDescription
data.value: Weighted and Unweighted are computed by semantic resolution at runtime and are not editable.

data.name: MaterialTagSemanticMlDescription
data.value: Uses the bundled ONNX model under Data/ONNX-AI/all-MiniLM-L6-v2-onnx (requires model.onnx). When enabled, automatic tags come only from MiniLM (keyword rules are not used for auto-tagging). Manual tag add/remove still applies on top.

data.name: MaterialTagMaxCountTooltip
data.value: Maximum material tags returned by semantic matching. Some built-in ore/material pairing rules and automatic flags may still add required tags beyond this value.

data.name: MaterialTagCertaintyThresholdTooltip
data.value: If the best semantic match is below this score, only Unknown is suggested (cosine similarity 0–1).

data.name: TagRuleIntensityTooltip
data.value: Leave empty to use global Tune values. Example: 0.85 softer normals, 0.07 subtler height.

data.name: TagRuleEnabledTooltip
data.value: When unchecked, this rule is excluded from the legend and Explore. Click Refresh to update.

data.name: ExportTagRulesTooltip
data.value: Save custom tag rules as JSON (for backup or CLI --tag-rules).

data.name: ImportTagRulesTooltip
data.value: Replace custom rules from a JSON file.

data.name: RefreshTagRulesTooltip
data.value: Update explore tree and legend with current rules.

data.name: InputSourceModeTooltip
data.value: Off: single resource pack (.zip / .jar). On: folder of packs for batch scan and convert.

data.name: Log_IndexedPngEntries
data.value: Indexed {0} .png entries; will extract only those + pack.mcmeta.

data.name: NormalStrengthTooltip
data.value: Strength of the normal map gradient. Higher = more pronounced surface relief.

data.name: HeightStrengthTooltip
data.value: Exponent for height-from-brightness. Higher = more contrast in the height map.

data.name: BrickProbeEnableTooltip
data.value: For textures tagged brick, decide whether to globally invert the height map when the probe detects light mortar that should be recessed. Requires the brick material tag (keyword or semantic).

data.name: BrickProbeMinStructureTooltip
data.value: Minimum mean structural mortar response (0–1) for the strong invert path (large height delta with high joint confidence). Thin joints often stay below this; the light-grout path does not use this threshold.

data.name: BrickProbeInvertDeltaTooltip
data.value: Strong path only: mortar mean height minus brick mean height must exceed this (0–255 scale) before a global invert. Lower values trigger more easily on subtle height separation.

data.name: BrickProbeLightGroutDeltaTooltip
data.value: Light-grout path: weighted diffuse luminance on mortar minus brick must exceed this (0–1). Lower if mortar and brick are similar in brightness. When Δ>0 and this passes, the height map is inverted so faces read higher than joints.

data.name: PreviewBrickProbeDebugTooltip
data.value: When enabled, the preview panel shows probe metrics (mask, meanS, height delta, lum gap, which invert path ran) for the selected texture. Conversion is unchanged.

data.name: SmoothnessScaleTooltip
data.value: Scales the specular smoothness (R channel) for non-metal textures.

data.name: MetallicBoostTooltip
data.value: Scales the specular response for textures detected as metal.

data.name: PorosityBiasTooltip
data.value: Offset added to the porosity/subsurface channel (LabPBR B) for heuristic and AI specular. Can be negative.

data.name: PlantMaterialPorosityExtraTooltip
data.value: Additional B-channel offset for textures with the Organic material tag (or OptiFine plant paths). Added on top of Porosity bias.

data.name: MlSpecularHeuristicBlendTooltip
data.value: 0 = pure heuristic specular when the AI model runs; 1 = full AI contribution. Intermediate values mix both.

data.name: MlSpecularBlendModeTooltip
data.value: Determines which channels receive heuristic contribution when blending with AI.

data.name: MlSpecularBlendMathTooltip
data.value: Selects the blend math used to combine heuristic and AI values for channels that are blended.

data.name: FastSpecularTooltip
data.value: Use approximate RGB distance for specular matching. Faster but less accurate than full color difference.

data.name: SpecularForceNoEmissiveTooltip
data.value: Override: set LabPBR specular map alpha to 255 (no emission) for all pixels. Blocks heuristic palette emission and ML emissive predictions.

data.name: FoliageTooltip
data.value: Applies only to textures with the 2D Sprite flag (organic material, not block). Ignore All: skip those. No Height: convert but omit height in normal alpha. Convert All: same as other textures.

data.name: HeightFromNormalsTooltip
data.value: Derive height from the generated normal map (Frankot-Chellappa) instead of from diffuse brightness. Keeps height consistent with normals.

data.name: NormalsFromDeepBumpTooltip
data.value: Generate normals from the diffuse using the DeepBump ONNX model (deepbump256.onnx). Replaces the built-in Sobel/VC normal generation.

data.name: DeepBumpOverlapTooltip
data.value: Larger overlap reduces tile seams but is slower. Large is recommended for best quality.

data.name: DeepBumpNormalIntensityTooltip
data.value: DeepBump-only normal XY strength multiplier. 1 = unchanged, higher = stronger details, lower = flatter normals.

data.name: DeepBumpNormalSoftClampTooltip
data.value: 0 = linear strength scaling. Higher values apply a soft tanh clamp to XY magnitude, keeping strong details while reducing near-90° saturation artifacts.

data.name: DeepBumpEdgeGuidedStrengthTooltip
data.value: Amplifies model normal XY magnitude more on strong diffuse edges. 0 = disabled, 1 = moderate, higher = sharper edges.

data.name: DeepBumpEdgeGuidedGammaTooltip
data.value: Controls where enhancement is concentrated. Higher values focus on the strongest edges; lower values spread across softer edges.

data.name: DeepBumpEdgeGuidedDirectionMixTooltip
data.value: Blends DeepBump normal direction toward diffuse-derived gradient direction on edges. 0 = keep model direction, 1 = fully align on strong edges.

data.name: NormalHeightTransparentAlphaClampMaxTooltip
data.value: Post-process clamp: if diffuse alpha ≤ this value, force normal/height RGBA to 0 to avoid artifacts in transparent regions. Slider caps at 16; you can type up to 255.

data.name: UseMlSpecularPredictorTooltip
data.value: When enabled and a default or per-resolution model path is valid, direct per-pixel specular RGBA is predicted from diffuse. Optional per-resolution paths (or bundled Data/ONNX-AI/SpecLab models) choose the ONNX by texture size (ceil). The heuristic/AI blend slider controls how much of the model is used versus the classic heuristic. Check the log for ML diagnostics.

data.name: MlSpecularModelPathWatermark
data.value: Path to specular generator/predictor ONNX file

data.name: MlSpecularPerResolutionTooltip
data.value: Override ONNX per training resolution. Leave blank to use bundled files under Data/ONNX-AI/SpecLab when present. The runtime picks the smallest configured resolution ≥ texture size (ceil); if the texture is larger than all keys, the largest key is used. Fallback default path above applies only when no per-resolution map is available.

data.name: MlSpecularUseEdgeChannel
data.value: Include Edge Channel for Specular Model Input (if Model Expects 4 Channels)

data.name: MlSpecularTransparentAlphaClampMaxTooltip
data.value: Post-process clamp: if diffuse alpha ≤ this value, force specular RGBA to 0 to avoid ML artifacts in transparent regions. Slider caps at 16; you can type up to 255.

data.name: SpecularDebugDisableHeuristicSpecularTooltip
data.value: Pixels that would use the classic specular path are forced to magenta (255,0,255). If ML failed entirely, the whole texture is magenta. Makes it obvious whether the model is driving pixels.

data.name: SpecularDebugSkipSpecularRemapTooltip
data.value: Disables the post-step that remaps R to the 10–200 range so you can judge model output directly.

data.name: SpecularDebugVerboseSpecularMlTooltip
data.value: Per texture, logs load/runtime details and a first-pixel sample when inference succeeds. Also logs precise errors when the model fails to load or output shape mismatches.

data.name: BlocksTooltip
data.value: Process textures in block and blocks folders.

data.name: ItemsTooltip
data.value: Process textures in item and items folders.

data.name: ArmorTooltip
data.value: Process textures in the entity folder (armor, etc.).

data.name: ParticlesTooltip
data.value: Process particle textures. Only specular maps are generated (no normal or height).

data.name: MaxThreadsTooltip
data.value: Worker threads for conversion. 0 = auto (typically CPU count minus 2).

data.name: ForceShaderCacheInvalidationTooltip
data.value: Deletes the on-disk GPU shader binary cache and recompiles preview shaders. Use after shader edits when the preview looks stale.

data.name: ShaderCacheInvalidatedLog
data.value: [Settings] Shader cache cleared; preview shaders will recompile.

data.name: OnnxPreferTensorRt
data.value: Prefer TensorRT for ONNX GPU (CUDA Fallback)

data.name: OnnxPreferTensorRtTooltip
data.value: When checked, ONNX models use the TensorRT execution provider with CUDA for unsupported ops. When unchecked, CUDA only—faster session startup; TensorRT may compile engines on first use.

data.name: TempFolderTooltip
data.value: Folder for temporary extraction during conversion. Empty = system temp.

data.name: MinecraftAssetsFolderTooltip
data.value: Optional path to a Minecraft version folder or extracted assets/ root. Used to resolve vanilla block models for texture-only pack preview.

data.name: CustomThreadedExtractionTooltip
data.value: Faster extraction on multi-core systems using parallel deflate decompression.

data.name: UseLegacyExtractorTooltip
data.value: Use the older ZipFile-based extractor instead of the default parallel one. Only if you hit issues with exotic zip formats.

data.name: Status_SelectPack
data.value: Select a resource pack (.zip or .jar) and an output folder.

data.name: Preview3DCameraBindings
data.value: Alt + drag (left or middle button): orbit. Drag without Alt (left or middle): pan. Wheel: zoom (fly speed while right-dragging). Right-drag: look (fly camera). While holding right button: WASD move, Q/E down/up, Shift faster, Ctrl slower. Double-click: frame subject. Click the preview for focus, then press the reset key to restore default framing.

data.name: Preview3DCameraOrbitBoomDistanceTooltip
data.value: Default pivot-to-camera distance for orbit mode (world units). Changing this resets the orbit zoom baseline while preserving yaw/pitch.

data.name: Preview3DCameraFlyMoveSpeedTooltip
data.value: Base WASD fly speed while holding right mouse. Use the mouse wheel during fly to adjust speed temporarily.

data.name: Preview3DCameraInvertLookYTooltip
data.value: Invert vertical mouse look for orbit and fly cameras.

data.name: Preview3DCameraFlySmoothAccelerationTooltip
data.value: Ease WASD fly movement in and out instead of instant starts and stops.

data.name: Preview3DCameraHelpItemFlyWasdInput
data.value: W / A / S / D (while right held)

data.name: Preview3DCameraHelpItemFlyWasdDesc
data.value: Move forward, strafe left, backward, and strafe right.

data.name: Preview3DCameraHelpItemFocusDesc
data.value: Focus the preview for keyboard shortcuts.

data.name: ShaderPreviewLabPbrDescription
data.value: These options apply when the right-hand preview is in 3D mode. 2D Sprite flagged textures use foliage-style crossed planes automatically; all other textures use the cube. The preview shader follows LabPBR channel conventions: height from _h (red), normals from _n, smoothness / metal flags from _s (green metal threshold matches common packs).

data.name: Preview3DEnableParallaxTooltip
data.value: Uses the LabPBR height map for clamped relief so albedo and subsequent map samples match displaced UVs. Shift limits keep grazing angles and orbit stable.

data.name: Preview3DEnableNormalMapTooltip
data.value: When off, shading uses mesh normals only (flat per face on the block).

data.name: Preview3DEnableSpecularMapTooltip
data.value: When off, diffuse-only preview with ambient and directional light (no smoothness or metal highlights).

data.name: Preview3DEnableParallaxShadowTooltip
data.value: Trace a short self-shadow ray across the parallax height field.

data.name: Preview3DEnableSssTooltip
data.value: Enable a cheap subsurface scattering approximation from the LabPBR porosity/SSS channel.

data.name: Preview3DEnableIblTooltip
data.value: Indirect ambient and specular from the scene environment (split-sum IBL). With atmospheric sky on, samples the blurred sky LUT; punctual sun specular comes from direct lighting only.

data.name: Preview3DIblStrengthTooltip
data.value: Intensity of the environment probe (indirect ambient + reflections). Lower if the model picks up too much sky tint; 0 falls back to flat ambient look.

data.name: Preview3DEnableAtmosphericSkyTooltip
data.value: Enable LUT-driven atmospheric sky background and ambient response.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereTurbidityTooltip
data.value: Aerosol density proxy. Higher values make the horizon hazier and sunsets warmer.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereSunIntensityTooltip
data.value: Scales atmospheric sun radiance used by the sky pass and indirect probes.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereHorizonFalloffTooltip
data.value: Controls extinction rolloff near the horizon (lower = broader glow, higher = tighter band).

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereSkyExposureTooltip
data.value: Master brightness on the sky composite pass. Lower to reduce bloom.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereSunDiscStrengthTooltip
data.value: Additive glare around the sun disc on top of the LUT. Lower for a softer halo; higher for a wider bloom.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereSunDiscBrightnessTooltip
data.value: Limb-darkened sun disc surface brightness. Does not affect the outer bloom halo.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereSunDiscSizeTooltip
data.value: Sun angular-size multiplier. 1.0 = stylized default; ~0.07 matches the real sun (0.27 degrees). Also scales the aureole and god-ray cone.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereMoonDiscStrengthTooltip
data.value: Surface brightness multiplier for the textured moon disc.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereMoonDiscSizeTooltip
data.value: Moon angular-size multiplier for the sky billboard.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereMoonGlowStrengthTooltip
data.value: Outer blue-white glow around the moon limb.

data.name: Preview3DAtmosphereMoonTextureSharpnessTooltip
data.value: Shader-side sharpening for the generated lunar texture.

data.name: Preview3DMoonWorldLightIntensityTooltip
data.value: Direct moonlight multiplier for lighting preview geometry at night. Does not change sky exposure or atmospheric fill.

data.name: Preview3DShowCelestialDebugTooltip
data.value: Draw square and crosshair markers at the sun and moon disc positions.

data.name: Preview3DHorizonFogStrengthTooltip
data.value: Fog fill below the horizon in the sky dome and aerial perspective on geometry (0 = off).

data.name: Preview3DEnableGodRaysTooltip
data.value: Froxel volume light shafts toward the sun (inject + integrate + upsample).

data.name: Preview3DEnableVolumetricCloudsTooltip
data.value: Procedural cloud layer in the sky pass (quality follows the preset below).

data.name: Preview3DVolumetricQualityTooltip
data.value: Low / medium / high froxel resolution, slice count, cloud detail, and temporal filtering.

data.name: Preview3DGodRayStrengthTooltip
data.value: Intensity of the additive god-ray composite (0 = off).

data.name: Preview3DCloudDensityTooltip
data.value: Scales volumetric density inside the cloud slab (higher = thicker, more opaque puffs).

data.name: Preview3DCloudCoverageScaleTooltip
data.value: Regional weather-map coverage scale (0 = clear sky, 1 = map as baked).

data.name: Preview3DCloudLayerHeightTooltip
data.value: Vertical offset added to the default cloud slab base height (world units).

data.name: Preview3DCloudVolumeHeightTooltip
data.value: Vertical extent of the main cumulus slab (world units).

data.name: Preview3DCloudVolumeSizeTooltip
data.value: World size of one noise tile cycle (larger = broader cloud shapes).

data.name: Preview3DCloudWindSpeedTooltip
data.value: Cloud field drift speed in world units per second.

data.name: Preview3DCloudWindHeadingTooltip
data.value: Wind direction on the ground plane in degrees (0 = +X).

data.name: Preview3DCloudCirrusStrengthTooltip
data.value: Opacity of the high thin cirrus sheet above the main layer (0 = off).

data.name: Preview3DCloudDebugViewTooltip
data.value: Replace lit clouds with a coverage map or mid-layer density slice overlay.

data.name: Preview3DCloudDisableTemporalTooltip
data.value: Turn off cloud history reprojection (useful while inspecting noise or march steps).

data.name: Preview3DCloudMarchStepsTooltip
data.value: Ray-march step override (0 = follow the quality preset).

data.name: Preview3DCloudFreezeWindTooltip
data.value: Hold cloud advection at time zero so shapes stay fixed while tuning lighting.

data.name: Preview3DEnablePreviewTaaTooltip
data.value: Final temporal anti-aliasing on the composited frame. Uses shared reprojection helpers; motion-aware when god rays provide scene depth. Per-pass temporal is halved while this is on.

data.name: Preview3DEnableShadowsTooltip
data.value: Render a directional shadow map with PCF filtering for the preview light.

data.name: Preview3DLightYawDegreesTooltip
data.value: Sun yaw in degrees (-180..180); rotates the light around the world up axis.

data.name: Preview3DLightPitchDegreesTooltip
data.value: Sun pitch in degrees (-89..89); negative places the sun above the horizon. Linked to Time of day when that slider moves.

data.name: Preview3DTimeOfDayHoursTooltip
data.value: Clock time (0–24 h) for the sun/moon cycle: 6 ≈ sunrise, 12 ≈ noon, 18 ≈ sunset, 0/24 ≈ midnight with stars.

data.name: Preview3DAnimateTimeOfDayTooltip
data.value: Advance the sun/moon cycle from the preview render clock (full day in 24 / speed seconds).

data.name: Preview3DTimeOfDaySpeedTooltip
data.value: Game-hours advanced per real second while animation is on (1 = 24 s per full day).

data.name: Preview3DEnableShadowCascadesTooltip
data.value: Near + far directional shadow maps; volume god rays pick the cascade by distance from the camera.

data.name: Preview3DParallaxHeightStrengthTooltip
data.value: Shader-side parallax displacement strength (maps to uHeightStrength).

data.name: Preview3DParallaxAoStrengthTooltip
data.value: Strength of local contact ambient occlusion derived from the POM height field.

data.name: Preview3DEnableParallaxAoTooltip
data.value: Enable local ambient occlusion darkening from the parallax height field.

data.name: Preview3DShowGridTooltip
data.value: Show an XZ reference grid under the object in 3D preview.

data.name: Preview3DShowGroundMeshTooltip
data.value: Show the textured grass ground plane under the object in 3D preview.

data.name: Preview3DEnableEntityAnimationTooltip
data.value: Enable render-time idle animation for emulated entity model previews.

data.name: Preview3DPauseEntityIdleAnimationTooltip
data.value: When enabled, emulated entity mesh animation freezes at the current pose until turned off. Legacy wobble is separate (see below).

data.name: Preview3DEnableLegacyEntityWobbleTooltip
data.value: Applies pre-IR whole-mesh bob/yaw/roll on the model matrix. Off by default — use lifted setupAnim / definition clips instead.

data.name: Preview3DEntityAnimationSpeedTooltip
data.value: Render-time speed multiplier for emulated entity idle motion.

data.name: Preview3DEntityAnimationAmplitudeTooltip
data.value: Render-time amplitude multiplier for emulated entity idle motion.

data.name: Preview3DEntityAlphaModeTooltip
data.value: For runtime mob rigs drawn via baked meshes with diffuse PNG transparency — opaque ignores diffuse alpha; cutout discards thin/low‑alpha texels (recommended default); blend composites progressively.

data.name: Preview3DEnableEntityLabPbrShadingTooltip
data.value: For runtime mob previews, use generated LabPBR normal and specular maps. Disable if lighting looks wrong on a specific rig.

data.name: Preview3DEnableEntityParallaxTooltip
data.value: For runtime mob previews, enable height-map parallax, parallax AO, and parallax self-shadow. Off by default; can shimmer at UV seams.

data.name: Preview3DSpritePlaneCountTooltip
data.value: For 2D Sprite flagged block foliage in 3D preview: 1 = single quad; 2–8 = extra Y-rotated planes (fuller silhouette, can look busy). Item textures always use one plane.

data.name: Preview3DSpriteThicknessTooltip
data.value: Extrudes each opaque sprite texel into a cuboid (Minecraft-style item thickening). 0 = flat card; up to 0.25 extrudes depth — at max, depth matches texel size for cubic voxels. Side faces use flat texel color, not stretched UV.

data.name: Preview3DCameraDebugFlyHint
data.value: Right-drag: look · WASD while right held: fly · R: reset orbit and fly offset
